title: goodenia nuda
intro: Goodenia nuda, also known as bareseed goodenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Goodenia nuda include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Goodenia nuda is often used in the form of a poultice or salve, and can also be made into a tea or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties.
